wikitext:
[]: song at the end of Rebuild 2.0...from dbz? Post by Rayshiest » Wed Jul 15, 2009 1:46 pm did anybody notice that the song that plays at the end of Rebuild of Evangelion 2.0 is the same song that Krillin sings in the first Broly movie of Dragonball Z??????

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 15, 2009 1:57 pm It's a remix of "Beautiful World", the song from 1.0. Locking before this becomes a playground for spam and trolling.
